◇ Upcoming Journeys
Dominican Republic
Punta Cana — Mommy & Kiddie Turn UP
Sun-soaked beach days meet family-friendly luxury. Enjoy all-inclusive dining, water sports, kids' club activities, and unforgettable bonding moments.
Jun 26–Jul 3, 2027 · 7 Nights
$3,838.99 · 2 Adults + 2 Children · Savings: $1,200
Thailand
Thailand — Chiang Mai to Bangkok
From ancient temples to bustling night markets, experience Thailand's rich culture. Savor authentic cuisine, explore sacred sites, and discover the perfect blend of tradition and modernity.
Apr 16–26, 2027 · 10 Nights
Custom planning available · $250 fee
Brazil
Rio de Janeiro & Paraty
Experience the vibrant energy of Rio's beaches and samba culture, then escape to Paraty's colonial charm. Discover breathtaking landscapes, historic cobblestone streets, and unforgettable Brazilian warmth.
Jul 10–17, 2026 · 7 Nights
2 Adults · All flights + hotels included
El Salvador
This Trip Won't Be A Bore — Turn Up in El Salvador
Surf world-class waves, explore volcanic landscapes, and immerse yourself in authentic Central American culture. From pristine beaches to historic Mayan ruins, adventure awaits at every turn.
Dec 26–30, 2027 · 5 Days
Villas · Private Chef · ATV · Hot Springs · Glamping
Belize
Please Belize Me — San Pedro Island
Crystal-clear Caribbean waters and overwater villas await on this island paradise. Snorkel the Barrier Reef, relax at Secret Beach, and indulge in laid-back tropical luxury.
May 18–22, 2027 · 5 Days
Lina Point Overwater Villas · Secret Beach · Caye Caulker
Dallas, Texas
Down in Dallas — Giraffes, Winery & Speakeasies
Experience Southern charm with a twist—feed giraffes at Oak Meadow Ranch, sip wine in Fort Worth, and explore hidden speakeasies. Urban sophistication meets Texas hospitality.
Nov 2–6, 2027 · 5 Days
Oak Meadow Ranch · Fort Worth · Edge of the Lake Winery
Panama
Panama — Canal · Bocas del Toro · Embera Village
Journey through engineering marvels, Caribbean paradise, and indigenous culture. Visit the iconic Panama Canal, island-hop in Bocas del Toro, and connect with the Embera people.
Dec 7–14, 2027 · 8 Days
Presidential Suite · Floating Bar · Monkey Island
St. Martin
St. Martin Turn Up!!! — French & Dutch Caribbean
Two nations, one stunning island—experience French elegance meets Dutch vibrancy. Snorkel at Maho Beach, yacht to St. Barths, and savor world-class cuisine on both sides.
Feb 12–17, 2027 · 6 Days
Sea Trek · St. Barths · Private Yacht · Maho Beach

ScubaDoo Excursion
Monday · June 28th, 2027

Excursion
11:30 AM
ScubaDoo — Vacation On RD
Beginner-friendly underwater scooter at Cabeza de Toro coast. No swimming required — explore at 3–5m depth, snorkel at dive point "El Niño," then glass-bottom boat cruise. Pickup from resort.

Saona Island — Vacation On RD

Monkey Land & Zip Lining
Friday · July 2nd, 2027

Excursion
06:45 AM
Monkey Land & Zip Lining — Punta Cana Adventures
18 platforms, 12 zip lines — including the 2 longest in DR (up to 800m!). Visit Coconut House for coconut oil demos, local coffee & exotic fruits. Then Monkeyland — 5-acre park where squirrel monkeys sit on your shoulders. Pickup from Hotel Lobby.

Thailand · April 2027

Thailand
Chiang Mai · Phuket · Phi Phi · Krabi · Bangkok

10-Night Thailand Experience by Tamara Smith
Friday, April 16 — Monday, April 26, 2027
Duration
10 Nights
Custom Planning
$250 Fee
Route
Chiang Mai → Phuket → Phi Phi → Krabi → Bangkok
Custom Trip Planning Available: Tamara can plan this trip from start to finish. Fee: $250 (with $100 applied toward your package if you book). Contact: tammy@seetheworldwithme2.com

Domestic flights: Book through Viajet (Chiang Mai → Phuket → Krabi → Bangkok). Chiang Mai driver: Paew · +66 96 951 5692
Full Itinerary
1
Chiang Mai Arrival
Friday · April 16th, 2027
▾
Lee Chiang Hotel — Old Chiang Mai
Standard Room · Book on Expedia · "A cute, cost-effective hotel for late arrivals"
Check In
Apr 16
Check Out
Apr 17
Nightly Rate
$45
2
La Lanna + Cooking School
Saturday · April 17th, 2027
▾
La Lanna — "Fly Me to the Moon" Suite
The famous moving-bed hotel. Book directly on Facebook: m.facebook.com/lalannaresort · Contact: +66 90 320 4141
View on Instagram
Check In
Apr 17
Check Out
Apr 18
Nightly Rate
$371
Activity
Zabb E Lee Thai Cooking School
Visit a local market first, then cook 5 dishes. Energetic teacher, scenic setting. Classes: 9am–2pm or 4–9pm. Contact school directly to book.
Watch Video
$30
3
Massage · Carp Cafe · Elephant Lodge
Sunday · April 18th, 2027
▾
Wellness
Lila Thai Massage — Old City
Traditional Thai massage in the Old City. ~$10/hr including tea and foot bath. One of many great massage spots in the area.
Watch Video
Café
Carp Cafe
Sit in the middle of a pond surrounded by koi fish. Purchase fish food for a few cents while you wait for your meal. Unique and delicious.
Watch Video
Chai Lai Orchid Ecolodge
Elephant sanctuary where elephants visit your room in the morning. Book at chailaiorchid.com or Expedia. Transport from Old Town included.
View on Instagram
Check In
Apr 18
Check Out
Apr 20
Stay
2 Nights
Nightly Rate
$90
Evening
Happy Hour with the Elephants @ Chai Lai
Enjoy cocktails and food while feeding and socializing with the elephants during golden hour. Magical experience.
Watch Video
4
Elephant Jungle Expedition
Monday · April 19th, 2027
▾
Excursion
Full Day
Elephant Jungle Expedition @ Chai Lai
Rated 10/10. Bond one-on-one with elephants — swim with them in the Mae Wang river, play with a baby elephant, hike through rice fields and jungle, discover hidden temples, bathe in cool waterfalls, and enjoy bamboo rafting with elephant sightings. Includes Thai picnic at a waterfall. Book: chailaiorchid.com
Watch Video
5
Flight to Phuket
Tuesday · April 20th, 2027
▾
Flight
CNX→HKT
Chiang Mai → Phuket — Viajet
Domestic flight. Use Grab or TADA app to get around Phuket (TADA is cheapest). Ferry tickets to Phi Phi (~$30) available on the strip in Patong Beach.
Café
Ma Doo Bua Café — Phuket
Famous Phuket café with stunning lotus ponds, Thai-style houses, and Victoria Water Lily views. Contemporary Thai cuisine, photography & drone footage offered. Site: madoobua.com · Tel: +66 7627 5002-8
Watch Video
Patong Signature Boutique Hotel
Indoor pool room. Book on Airbnb. Within walking distance to all Patong Beach action.
View on Instagram
Check In
Apr 20
Check Out
Apr 21
Nightly Rate
$132
Nightlife
Patong Beach Nightlife
Hookah lounges, clubs, bars, cabaret shows — just steps from the hotel. Incredibly fun and entertaining night out.
Watch Video
6
Tiger Kingdom · Fine Dining
Wednesday · April 21st, 2027
▾
Activity
Tiger Kingdom
Walk in and interact with tigers — no reservations needed. Arrive early. Short uber ride from the hotel.
Watch Video
Patong Signature Boutique Hotel — Different Room
Room with tub and city view. Try booking directly with hotel for a better rate. Airbnb: airbnb.com/rooms/5322625
View on Instagram
Check In
Apr 21
Check Out
Apr 22
Optional
Shooting Range
Several shooting ranges near the hotel — optional activity not far from Patong.
Watch Video
Dining
Su Va Na Phuket — Fine Dining Underwater Restaurant
⚠️ Tamara's honest note: "Ambiance 10/10, food was terrible and overpriced — no prices on menu. Ask for pricing before ordering. Alternative: The Slate, Black Ginger (highly recommended for fine dining). Make reservations either way."
Watch Video
7
Ferry to Phi Phi Island
Thursday · April 22nd, 2027
▾
Transport
Ferry — Phuket to Phi Phi Island
Get ferry tickets (~$30) on the strip in Patong Beach. Everything on Phi Phi Island is within walking distance.
Watch Video
Coco Bella — Phi Phi Island
Standard room. Book on Expedia or Booking.com — compare prices. One-night stay.
Check In
Apr 22
Check Out
Apr 23
Nightly Rate
$88
Nightlife
Reggae Bar — Thai Boxing
Volunteer to fight in a boxing ring and win liquor — then watch a pro Thai boxing match. Funny and memorable. Walking distance from hotel.
Watch Video
Nightlife
Slinky Bar — Fire Show & Mechanical Bull
Fire show, mechanical bull rides, and more entertainment. Fun night out.
Watch Video
Nightlife
Ibiza House
Pool party on Sundays — gets crowded but another great experience on the island.
Watch Video
8
Longtail Boat · Ferry to Krabi
Friday · April 23rd, 2027
▾
Activity
Phi Phi Island Luxury Longtail Boat Tour
Private island tour with beach picnic — fruits, champagne & more in the luxury package. Other budget options available. Contact: The Pol Koh PhiPhi +66 96 903 6324
View on Instagram
Transport
Ferry — Phi Phi to Krabi
Buy speedboat tickets at a booth on the island. In Krabi: use Grab. Don't wait in the taxi line — walk out of port and call a Grab.
Watch Video
Café
Mountain View Coffee — Krabi
Extremely picturesque café where food gets zip-lined to your table! ~15-20 min from resort. Make reservations.
Watch Video
Poonsiri Resort Aonang — SHA · Krabi
Overwater villa in Krabi. Book on Booking.com. Nightly rate: $70.
View on Instagram
Check In
Apr 23
Check Out
Apr 24
Nightly Rate
$70

Flight
KBV→BKK
Krabi → Bangkok — Viajet
Domestic flight. Bangkok driver recommended: +66 82 929 4861 (used for full stay, most cost-effective — 2.5 hrs from airport).
Kundala Beach Club — Hua Hin
Sky Pool Suite — pool floor visible from inside the room! Book at kundalabeachresort.com or Expedia. 2 hrs from Bangkok — Tamara recommends 2+ nights.

O2 Kaffee & Bistro

Bangkok — Cafés, Floating Market, Nightlife
Sunday · April 25th, 2027
▾
Café
Bubble Forest Café
Cute café surrounded by water. Good food. Stop here on the way to/from Kundala Beach Club. Make reservations to avoid a long wait.
Watch Video
Activity
Street Food / Floating Market
Ask your driver to take you — a must-do Bangkok experience.
Watch Video
Shan Villas Sukhumvit — Bangkok
Cute city-center stay close to downtown. Floating brunch available. Nightly Rate: $85.
View on Instagram
Check In
Apr 25
Check Out
Apr 26
Nightly Rate
$85
Nightlife
Downtown Bangkok Nightlife
Afrobeats club with hookah: Bafros. Plenty of other clubs nearby.
Watch Video
Dining
Frying Pan Jamaican Restaurant
Authentic Jamaican food. Owner is Jamaican and very welcoming. Walking distance to the Afrobeats club — perfect dinner before a night out.
Watch Video
11
Departure Day
Monday · April 26th, 2027

Activity
Safari World
Orangutan encounter safari park — fun experience, not far from the hotel. Great way to spend time before your flight.

BKK→NYC
Bangkok → New York City
Departs Bangkok Suvarnabhumi International Airport (BKK).
🗒 Things Tamara Wishes She Had Time For:

Chiang Mai: Chom Cafe · Stay at the Heaven Villa · Norden Glamping
Bangkok: PLA 2 Floating Villa (Kanchanaburi, 3.5 hrs from Bangkok) · Manpai Sainam Café · Natura Cafe · Beachy Cafe · Nives Cafe · Staneemeehoi Restaurant · Railway Market · The Bed Cinema
Phuket: Yona Beach Club · Mai Khao Beach (low-flying planes) · The Slate / Black Ginger dining · Similan Island · Sripanwa Phuket · Kor Ra Kang Cafe · Cocktail Making Class @ Chalong Bay Rum
Chiang Rai: Glamping at Anantara
Brazil · July 2026

Rio de Janeiro
& Paraty, Brazil

Helicopters · Favelas · Caipirinhas · Coastline
July 10 — July 17, 2026 · 8 Days / 7 Nights
Duration
7 Nights
Guests
2 Adults
Included
Flights · Hotels · Breakfast
What's Included: Roundtrip Economy Flights · 4-Hour Bus to Paraty · Daily Breakfast · Private Favela Mototaxi Tour
Not Included: Travel Insurance · Visa Fees · Personal Expenses · Unlisted entrance fees
Deposit: 50% non-refundable to secure booking · Balance: Due 60 days prior · Contact: Tammy@SeeTheWorldWithMe2.com
Full Itinerary
1
Arrival in Rio de Janeiro
Saturday · July 11th, 2026
▾
Transfer
Arrival at GIG — Galeão International Airport
Airport transfer to Janeiro Hotel, Leblon Beach.
Watch Video
Evening
Tour
Rocinha Favela Mototaxi Tour
2.5-hour guided mototaxi tour through Rocinha, Rio's largest favela. Immersive, cultural, and unforgettable first night in Rio.
Watch Video
Janeiro Hotel — Leblon Beach, Rio de Janeiro
Leblon Beach, Rio de Janeiro.
View on Instagram
Check In
July 10
Check Out
July 15
Stay
5 Nights
2
Jeep Tour Experience
Sunday · July 12th, 2026
▾
Morning
Tour
Tijuca Forest + Christ the Redeemer
Picked up by jeep for a tour through Tijuca Forest — the world's largest urban rainforest — culminating at the iconic Christ the Redeemer statue.
Watch Video
Lunch
Local Restaurant
Recommended: APRAVIZEL — a Michelin-recommended local restaurant.
Watch Video
Afternoon
City Tour + Sugarloaf Mountain
Royal Portuguese Reading Room · Lapa Arches · Santa Teresa neighborhood · cable car ride up Sugarloaf Mountain for panoramic views of Rio.
Watch Video
3
Helicopter + Cooking Class
Monday · July 13th, 2026
▾
Morning
Flight
Helicopter Tour of Rio
Option 1: Voo Carioca — scenic 30-min helicopter flight over Christ the Redeemer, Sugarloaf, Ipanema Beach & beyond. Option 2: shorter budget flight available. Book in advance.
Watch Video
Afternoon
Brazilian Seafood BBQ Cooking Class
3-hour hands-on cooking class featuring Brazilian seafood BBQ. Learn traditional techniques from a local chef.
Watch Video
4
Bay Cruise — Islands & Museums
Tuesday · July 14th, 2026
▾
Full Day
5-Hour Bay Cruise
Visit Ilha Fiscal island, the Tomorrow Museum (Museu do Amanhã), and cruise Guanabara Bay past Rio's iconic skyline and landmarks. Includes food & drinks.
Watch Video
5
Transfer to Paraty

▾
Transfer
Rio de Janeiro → Paraty by Bus (4 hours)
Pickup at Janeiro Hotel, scenic 4-hour bus ride along the coast to Paraty.

Paraty, Rio de Janeiro Coast. Check in and explore the cobblestone colonial town of Paraty.

July 15
Check Out

Stay
2 Nights

Free Day in Paraty
Thursday · July 16th, 2026
▾
Leisure
Your Day, Your Way

Departure

Belize · May 2027

Please
Belize Me

San Pedro Island · Caye Caulker · Secret Beach
Tuesday, May 18 — Saturday, May 22, 2027
Duration
5 Days · 4 Nights
Hotel
Lina Point Over Water Villas
Currency
$1 USD = $2 Belize
Getting to San Pedro Island: Option 1 — 30-min drive to ferry, then 1.5-hr ferry ride (~$30-35/ticket). Option 2 — 15-min flight from Belize City on Maya Island Air ($78-90) or Tropic Air ($90-120).
Golf Cart Rental: Rocks Golf Cart Rentals (+501 629 4321) · $35/day — cheapest on island, they meet you at the airport. Don't rent from the resort!
Full Itinerary
1
Arrival · Paint & Splash · Wahoo Lounge
Tuesday · May 18th, 2027
▾
Transport
Arrival Flight to Belize City (BZE)
Fly into Belize City, then connect to San Pedro Island via ferry or small plane.
Watch Video
Transport
Rocks Golf Cart Rental
Rent golf cart for island transport. +501 629 4321 · $35/day. They will meet you at the airport.
Watch Video
$35/day
Activity
01:45
Paint & Splash @ Nauti Crab
Thursdays only — must reserve 3 hours prior. Fun paint and splash event. IG: @nauticrabbelize
Watch Video
$25
Lina Point Over Water Villas
4 Nights · Check In: May 18 · Check Out: May 22 · $160-290/night · Great on-site restaurant, super accommodating staff. Message Tamara to get direct price match with property manager.
Evening
04:00
Wahoo Lounge — Chicken Drop
Beach party spot where you bet money on where a chicken will walk. Only in Belize! 04:00–11:00 (7 hrs).
Watch Video
2
Catamaran to Caye Caulker
Wednesday · May 19th, 2027
▾
Excursion
Full Day
Catamaran to Caye Caulker — Snorkeling & Open Bar
Full-day catamaran trip to Caye Caulker. Snorkeling included. Walk the island, visit "The Split" — a narrow water channel with restaurants, jerk chicken, music, swimming, and great views. Described as a big day party. Ferry option available as a cost-effective alternative.
Watch Video
$90-125 per person
Dinner
Dinner at Sunset Lounge Rooftop
Rooftop dinner spot with sunset views. Ends around 10pm.
Watch Video
3
Secret Beach · Caramba Seafood
Thursday · May 20th, 2027
▾
Morning
Breakfast @ Resort
Watch Video
Beach
Day Trip
Secret Beach
25-30 min bumpy golf cart ride (fun when tipsy!). Eat and drink at Blue Bayou — tables in the water, great food & music. Avoid other spots nearby (tourist traps). Also stop at Pirates for appetizers. Water activities available. Optional return stop: Truck Stop — live music nightly, games, big screens, lagoon views, Asian & Latin food.
Watch Video
Dinner
Caramba Seafood Restaurant
Hand-pick your own fresh seafood and tell them how to cook it. Red snapper and shrimp are standouts. Large, reasonably priced drinks.
Watch Video
Optional
Jaguars Bar
Music and drinks — optional night out.
Watch Video
4
Brunch · Happy Hour · Sunset Cruise
Friday · May 21st, 2027
▾
Brunch
9am–Noon
Brunch @ Nauti Crab
Sunday Mimosa Towers brunch. Brunch served 9am–Noon.
Watch Video
Happy Hr
3–5pm
Pur Boutique Happy Hour
Afternoon happy hour at Pur Boutique.
Watch Video
Evening
Palapa Bar and Grill or Sunset Cruise
Choose between Palapa Bar & Grill or a sunset cruise. See catamaran options in notes.
Watch Video
5
Spa · Elvis Kitchen · Explore
Saturday · May 22nd, 2027
▾
Wellness
Relax @ Resort / Day Spa
Spa day at Lina Point resort or "Massage by the Reef Day Spa" (IG: massage_by_the_reef_belize, +501 621 8025) — compare prices.
Watch Video
Dining
Lunch / Dinner @ Elvis Kitchen
Local favourite for a final island meal.
Watch Video
Activity
Explore San Pedro Island via Golf Cart
Final exploration of the island before departure.
Watch Video
🚤 Catamaran / Excursion Companies:
• Tacio Tours — taciostours.bz · +501 637-0158 · Private boat $400 ($100/person) · Full day Caye Caulker snorkeling
• Yolo Tours — islanddreamtours.com · +501 615-9656 · $135 public tours (all-inclusive, breakfast, buffet lunch, open bar)
• Under Sea Tours — belizebbqboat.com · +501 632-3845 · ~$150 full day
• Tuff-E-Nuff — $70 half-day · Shark Ray Alley snorkeling · Max 8 people
• Seaduced by Belize — seaducedbybelize.com · $145/person · Sandbar, paddleboards, kayaks, lunch, drinks · Sunset wine & tapas cruise $75/person
• Caribbean Breeze Tours — $99/person · Full day Hol Chan & Caye Caulker · Manatee spotting
• Sirena Azul Sailboat — $100 · 8:30am departure · Snorkeling + Caye Caulker lunch

🏷️ IG Captions: "Please Belize It" · "Unbelizable" · "Belize it or Not" · "You Better Belize it" · "Seeing is Belizing"
Dallas, Texas · November 2027

Down in
Dallas

Giraffes · Winery · Speakeasies · Gondola Rides
Tuesday, November 2 — Saturday, November 6, 2027
Duration
5 Days
Transport
Rental Car Recommended
Highlight
Oak Meadow Ranch Giraffe Stay
Getting Around: Rent a car — the giraffe hotel and winery are 45 min–1 hr from the city center. Most cost-effective option. Use Expedia to find a rental or use Uber for city activities.
Hotel Options: Aloft (stayed here — cost effective, great location 5-10 min from action) · Hall Arts Hotel · The Virgin Hotel · Crescent Court
Full Itinerary
1
Arrival · Museums · Fine Dining · R&B Night
Tuesday · November 2nd, 2027
▾
Check In
Hotel Check In
Aloft Dallas recommended — cost effective, great central location 5-10 min from all action.
Watch Video
Activity
Picnic — DFW Urban Picnics
Optional: Curated picnic experience. 214-205-5967 · dfwurbanpicnics.com · loveandboat.com for boat picnic option. Great for groups, solo, or romantic. Can do Rainbow Vomit or Museum of Illusions after.
Watch Video
Activity
Immersive Art @ Rainbow Vomit
Colorful immersive art experience — not far from city center (5-20 min). Great for content creation.
Watch Video
Activity
Museum of Illusions
Just walk in, get tickets and enjoy. Fun for groups.
Watch Video
Fine Dining
Nick & Sam's Fine Dining
Excellent steakhouse. Make reservations: nick-sams.com
Watch Video
Nightlife
21:45
R&B Night @ Mr. X / Izkina
Start the Dallas nightlife. Alternatives: Green Light · Izkina Speakeasy · Capones Speakeasy · The Wonder Bar (aesthetically very cute — Tamara went here)
Watch Video
2
Fort Worth · Winery · Giraffe Stay · Bonfire
Wednesday · November 3rd, 2027
▾
Excursion
09:30–13:00
Fort Worth Stockyards
True Texas experience — arrive at 11am or 4pm for the cattle walk. Make custom cowboy/cowgirl hats at flea style. Go to Wet Willie's. Line dancing & mechanical bull riding. Fort Worth is ~45 min from Dallas city center. ⚠️ Tamara recommends NOT doing all three (Stockyards + winery + giraffe stay) on the same day.
Watch Video
Winery
15:00–17:00
Edge of the Lake Winery
Beautiful vineyard 10-15 min from giraffe stay. Make reservations: edgeofthelakevineyard.com · 940-726-3785 · 920 Co Rd 231, Valley View, TX 76272
Watch Video
Oak Meadow Ranch — Giraffe Stay
Check In: Nov 03 · 16:00 · Check Out: Nov 04 · ~45 min from Dallas city. Staff go above and beyond. Tamara notes: Skip the $250/person dinner experience — bring your own food. Book on Airbnb.
View on Instagram
Evening
20:30–22:00
Bonfire / S'mores / Fireside
Included in the Oak Meadow Ranch stay. Meeting point: Red Mill Lawn.
Watch Video
3
Yoga · Gondola · Brunch · Bar Hop
Thursday · November 4th, 2027
▾
Morning
09:00
Yoga @ Oak Meadow Ranch
Complimentary yoga offered some mornings at the ranch.
Watch Video
Activity
Gondola Ride — Irving, TX
Cute gondola ride through Las Colinas canals. Add-ons: charcuterie boards, lunch, or a message in a bottle. Pizza store in walking distance (Italian Cafe, 387 E Las Colinas Blvd). Book: gondola.com · (855) 466-3652
Watch Video
Brunch
Brunch & Bubbly @ Izkina
Brunch at Izkina — champagne and good vibes. Alternatives: Kitchen and Kocktails · Spatch · Eso Mimosa Bar · Kiss
Watch Video
Check In
Airbnb Check In
Lovely Airbnb stay — 10-15 min from activities, 45 min from Fort Worth, 30 min from DFW airport.
Watch Video
Nightlife
Bar Hop + 5 AM Club
Options: Frida Social Club (patron drinks tree — Tamara went here, food & drinks great) · Wonder Bar · Sweet Tooth Hotel (bathtub drinks) · Secret Speakeasies (Bodega, Cross Faded, Truth & Alibi) · Kchetes sports bar · Backyard Dallas · Clubs: Levels, Playhouse (upscale)
Watch Video
4
Massage · Game Show · Frida · Day Party
Friday · November 5th, 2027
▾
Wellness
10:00
Massage — Craig (ablessedtouchtherapy)
Sensual and regular massages. Craig travels to you. IG: ablessedtouchtherapy. Women only. Alternative: King Spa Dallas.
Watch Video
Activity
Game Show Battle Room
Interactive game show experience — great for groups. Must book in advance. Book: gameshowbattlerooms.com/dallas
Watch Video
Dining
Brunch or Dinner @ Frida — Patron Tree Drinks
Great drinks, good service, decent food. No reservations needed. Famous for the patron tree presentation. Alternatives: Fusion Vibes · Bottle Blonde · Spatch
Watch Video
Day Party
@ Fivee Day Party
Dallas Sunday day party. Alternative: Dallas Social (club-like on Sundays)
Watch Video
5
Departure Day — Local Food Spots
Saturday · November 6th, 2027
▾
Dining
Options
Local Quick Food Spots
Wing Mac · Daqs Crazy & Wings · Shells & Tails 2 Geaux · Bomshack Dallas · Smoke-a-holics BBQ · The Passion Cafe · South Steaks and Cakes · Reggae Wings and Tings · Neighbors Hot Chicken · Best Tex Tacos and Tamales · Nana Kitchen · Aunt Irenes · Kajun Konnexion · Trace Buds
Watch Video
Panama · December 2027

Panama
Canal · Bocas del Toro · Embera Village

8 Days · Panama City · Bocas del Toro
Tuesday, December 7 — Tuesday, December 14, 2027
Duration
8 Days
Transport
Uber + Driver Marc
Driver
Marc · +507 6986-1671
Getting Around: Use Uber in the city. For far trips (Embera Village) use driver Marc: +507 6986-1671 — tell him Tammy & Kenny referred you for the best rate. Compare Marc's prices with tour-included transport.
Full Itinerary
1
Arrival · Monkey Island · Bar Crawl
Tuesday · December 7th, 2027
▾
Presidential Suite @ Las Americas Golden Tower
Check In: Dec 07 · 15:00 · Check Out: Dec 08 · 11:00 · Near Tower of the Americas, Panama Canal & Museum of Biodiversity. Great staff, nice views, free breakfast.
Excursion
02:30
Monkey Island / Panama Canal
Combine Monkey Island and Panama Canal in one tour for $68. Check ship schedule before going. Book on Airbnb Experiences. Note: Bocas Del Toro also has a monkey sanctuary island.
Watch Video
$68 combined tour
Lunch
Lunch @ Mi Ranchito
Local restaurant with a pool area — great food in a relaxed tropical setting.
Watch Video
Nightlife
Bar Crawl — Casco Viejo (Old City)
Guided bar crawl through Panama's historic old town. panamabarcrawl.com · $50 · Meeting point: Hotel
Watch Video
2
Blue Hill Cabins · Chocolate Class · Casino · Selina Rooftop
Wednesday · December 8th, 2027
▾
Optional
06:30
Complimentary Breakfast
Watch Video
Activity
Blue Hill Cabins — ATVs / Rainbow Slide
Similar to El Salvador — ATV rides and the famous rainbow slide at Blue Hill Cabins.
Watch Video
Activity
Chocolate Making / Tasting Class
Options: Oreba Cacao Plantation (jungle chocolate making/tasting) · Nome — chocolate making in old town
Watch Video
Evening
JW Marriott Casino & Floor 66 Rooftop Bar
Casino night followed by drinks at the spectacular Floor 66 rooftop bar with panoramic city views.
Watch Video
Dining
Dinner @ Salvaje Restaurant
Unique dining experience with monkey-masked servers and theatrical food presentation.
Watch Video
Nightlife
10:00
Selina Rooftop
Watch Video

Thursday · December 9th, 2027
▾
Optional
06:30
Complimentary Breakfast
Watch Video
Excursion
Full Day
Boat Trip to Taboga Island
Options: Panama Sailing Tours to Taboga Island (used by Tamara) — Direct: +507 6747-7707 · Black Magic Panama: Unique pirate boat party to Taboga Island
Watch Video
Rooftop
09:00
Tantalo Rooftop Bar
Iconic Casco Viejo rooftop bar with stunning views of the city skyline and bay.
Watch Video
4
Embera Village · San Blas · Sistas Restaurant
Friday · December 10th, 2027
▾
Optional
06:30
Complimentary Breakfast
Watch Video
⭐ Must Do
Full Day
Embera Village — HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
Boat trip into the rainforest to visit the Tusipono Embera tribe. Hike through lush jungle to Mono waterfall (swim Dec–Apr). Meet the tribe, learn their traditions, enjoy local food. Book with layoverpanama.com (often cheapest) or through driver Marc.
Watch Video
$145 p/p
Optional
San Blas Day Trip
All-day trip to beautiful white sand beaches. Skip if doing Bocas del Toro — go to Embera Village instead.
Watch Video
$145 p/p
Dining
13:00
Sistas Restaurant — Jamaican Food
Great for takeout lunch. Authentic Jamaican food in Panama City.
Watch Video
Café
09:00
Lazo Tea
Beautiful café with a pool area — great for a relaxed afternoon.
Watch Video
5
Cooking Class · Casa Casco
Saturday · December 11th, 2027
▾
Optional
06:30
Complimentary Breakfast
Watch Video
Activity
Cooking Class Options
• Afro-Panamanian Cooking Class ($50) — contact IG: davewisemanadhiambo
• Taste Kitchen ($80) — Traditional Panamanian · IG: tastekitchen.pa
• Boozy Cooking Class ($85) — Cook, Drink & Eat · cookinpanama.com
Watch Video
Activity
Casa Casco
Explore the vibrant Casco Viejo neighborhood — galleries, cafés, colorful streets.
Watch Video
6
Swing & Zipline · Hookah Lounge
Sunday · December 12th, 2027
▾
Excursion
Swing & Zipline @ Poin Panama
Swing on a giant swing over the Panama City skyline and ocean — one of the most unique experiences in Panama! Book: poinpanama.com
Watch Video
$25-40
Evening
Al Basha Restaurante / Hookah Lounge
Great Middle Eastern food and hookah in a beautiful red velvet lounge setting.
Watch Video
7
Bocas del Toro — Floating Bar · Monkey Island
Monday · December 13th, 2027
▾
Activity
Bocas del Toro Floating Bar
The famous floating bar in Bocas del Toro — a double-decker bar floating in crystal-clear turquoise water. IG: @the.floating.bar
Watch Video
Excursion
Bocas Del Toro Monkey Island @ Urraca Resort
30-minute boat ride. Interact with free-roaming monkeys on their own island sanctuary. Book: monkeyislandbocaspanama@gmail.com or WhatsApp +507-6668-2027
Watch Video
$20
St. Martin · February 2027

St. Martin
Turn Up!!!

French & Dutch Caribbean Paradise
Friday, February 12 — Wednesday, February 17, 2027
Duration
6 Days · 5 Nights
Flight
JFK → SXM · JetBlue B6787
Islands
St. Martin · St. Barths · Tintamarre · Pinel
Full Itinerary
1
Arrival · Sea Trek · Sunset Massage · Private Chef
Friday · February 12th, 2027
▾
Flight
JFK→SXM
New York → Sint Maarten — JetBlue B6787
Departs JFK at 07:09 · Arrives SXM at 11:10 · 4 hr 1 min
Dining
Lunch @ Philipsburg
Lunch in the capital city of the Dutch side — colorful buildings and duty-free shopping.
Watch Video
Activity
03:00–05:00
Sea Trek — Underwater Helmet Walk
Walk on the ocean floor with a special helmet — no diving certification needed. See tropical fish, coral, and sea life up close. 2 hours of underwater adventure.
Watch Video
Errands
Stop at Grocery Store
Stock up the villa with essentials and snacks for the week.
Watch Video
Wellness
18:00–19:00
Relax Relate Release — Sunset Massage with Dessert & Champagne
Beachside sunset massage with champagne and dessert. 1 hour of pure relaxation.
Watch Video
Dining
19:30
Welcome Dinner — Private Chef
Private chef prepares a welcome dinner at the villa.
Watch Video
Evening
21:00
Game Night in Villa
Board games, cards, and bonding time at the villa.
Watch Video
2
Floating Brunch · Rum Tour · Buggy Adventure · Grande Case Dinner
Saturday · February 13th, 2027
▾
Morning
08:30–10:00
Floating Brunch
Unique floating brunch experience on the water — 1 hr 30 min of food, drinks, and Caribbean vibes.
Watch Video
Tour
10:15
Rum Tour
Visit a local distillery to learn about Caribbean rum production and taste different blends.
Watch Video
Adventure
13:00–18:00
SXM Hotspots via Buggy
5-hour buggy tour exploring St. Martin's best spots — beaches, viewpoints, hidden gems, and photo ops. Off-road adventure around the island.
Watch Video
Dinner
19:00
Grande Case For Dinner
The culinary capital of the Caribbean. Options: Ocean 82 · Lolo (local BBQ stalls) · Blue Martini. Grande Case is known for its French-Caribbean fusion and beachfront dining.
Watch Video
3
Private Yacht · Tintamarre · Pinel Island · Lotus Ladies Night
Sunday · February 14th, 2027
▾
Morning
Breakfast
Watch Video
Excursion
Full Day
Private Yacht to Tintamarre and Pinel Island
Full-day private yacht charter. Tintamarre Island — uninhabited nature reserve with pristine beaches, crystal-clear water, and snorkeling. Pinel Island — small Caribbean island with white sand beaches, beach bars, and water sports. Snorkel, swim, sunbathe, and explore.
Watch Video
Dinner
Dinner at Simpson Bay
Options: Skip Jack's (seafood) · Lee's Roadside Grill (local Caribbean flavors). Simpson Bay is known for its waterfront dining and marina views.
Watch Video
Nightlife
Lotus Club — Ladies Night
Wednesday is Ladies Night at Lotus Club. Music, drinks, and dancing.
Watch Video
4
St. Barths Day Trip · Nikki Beach · Hookah Lounge · Rooftop Club
Monday · February 15th, 2027
▾
Excursion
07:45
St. Barths Day Trip
Ferry or charter to St. Barthélemy (St. Barths) — the luxury island of the French Caribbean. Famous for its European charm, designer boutiques, yacht-filled harbors, and celebrity sightings.
Watch Video
Activity
Island Hop — Nikki Beach / Shopping
Nikki Beach St. Barths — iconic beach club with white beds, champagne, and DJ music. Explore Gustavia for high-end shopping (Louis Vuitton, Hermès, local boutiques). Walk the harbor and soak in the French-Caribbean atmosphere.
Watch Video
Evening
Hookah @ We Lounge in SXM
Return to St. Martin for hookah and drinks at We Lounge — relaxed vibe with shisha and Caribbean cocktails.
Watch Video
Nightlife
Moon Bar Night Club Rooftop
Rooftop nightclub with panoramic views of the island. Dance under the stars.
Watch Video
5
Villa Day · Maho Beach · Sunset Vibes
Tuesday · February 16th, 2027
▾
Morning
Breakfast
Watch Video
Relax
Rest & Enjoy the Villa
Recovery day — pool, sun, naps, and vibes. Recharge before departure.
Watch Video
Beach
Lunch/Dinner
Maho Beach Lunch / Dinner
Famous for planes flying 30 feet overhead as they land at the airport. Watch planes, feel the jet blast, swim, and dine. Options: Loterie Farm (rainforest pool and restaurant) · Roxxy (beach club) · Rainbow Cafe (casual beachfront). Maho Beach is a must-do St. Martin experience.
Watch Video
6
Departure Day
Wednesday · February 17th, 2027
▾
Flight
SXM→JFK
Sint Maarten → New York — JetBlue B61088
Departs SXM at 11:50 · Arrives JFK at 16:00 · 4 hr 10 min

Reviews

Real stories from real travellers
★★★★★
"Tamara planned an absolutely flawless trip to Punta Cana for my family. Every detail was taken care of — transfers, excursions, hotels. We saved over $1,200 and had the time of our lives!"
— Katherine G. · Punta Cana 2022
★★★★★
"Thailand was the trip of a lifetime. The elephant sanctuary, Phi Phi Island nights, the moving-bed hotel — none of that would have happened without Tamara's insider knowledge."
— Travel Client · Thailand 2023
★★★★★
"From the moment we landed to the moment we left, everything was seamless. Tamara thought of everything — even things we didn't know we needed. 10/10 would travel again."
— Danielle R. · Client
★★★★★
"The Saona Island and ScubaDoo excursions were the highlights of our entire year. Tamara recommended both and she was absolutely right. Experiences we never would have found alone."
— Alice G. · Punta Cana 2022

Our Story

About Us

Travel Planners International

See The World With Me is a bespoke travel planning service founded by Tamara Smith — a passionate globetrotter with firsthand experience across the Caribbean, Latin America, Southeast Asia, and beyond.

Tamara's philosophy is simple: every trip should be transformative, not just transactional. She handpicks every hotel, excursion, and transfer based on personal experience — not commission incentives or generic packages. Her detailed notes, insider contacts, and honest reviews set her apart.

Through her affiliation with Travel Planners International, Tamara secures exclusive rates, insider access, and real savings for her clients — all while delivering white-glove service that turns a vacation into a memory that lasts a lifetime.

"Curated · Luxurious · Unforgettable"

Bespoke Travel Design

Build My Itinerary

Tell Tamara about your dream trip and she'll personally curate a one-of-a-kind itinerary built around your destinations, dates, and budget.

How It Works

Your Custom Journey in 4 Steps

1
Submit Request
Fill out the form below with your travel vision & pay the $300 design fee.
2
Discovery Call
Tamara reaches out within 48 hours to discuss your style & priorities.
3
Custom Itinerary
Receive a fully designed day-by-day itinerary within 7–10 business days.
4
Refine & Book
Two rounds of revisions included. Then book with confidence.
Itinerary Design Fee
$300 non-refundable
Covers research, design, two rounds of revisions, and a polished PDF itinerary delivered to your inbox. Fee is credited toward any trip you book through See The World With Me.
